title: narcissus tazetta subsp. aureus
intro: Narcissus tazetta subsp. aureus, also known as the golden narcissus or paperwhite, is a type of bulbous perennial plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Narcissus tazetta subsp. aureus include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy. Narcissus tazetta subsp. aureus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to promote respiratory health and alleviate congestion.
